name.en-US: Little Office of the Blessed Virgin Mary According to the Ambrosian Rite

description.en-US: A traditional little office in honour of Blessed Virgin Mary According to the Ambrosian Rite, arranged in the canonical hours.

history.en-US:
Taken from the Breviarium Ambrosianum (1957).

Quod omnibus anni temporibus unum et idem dicitur
juxta ritum Sanctae Mediolanensis Ecclesiae.
